# Dhruv's blog - Full Content Directory

> This file provides a comprehensive list of all content available on deardhruv.com for Large Language Models and AI agents.

## Core Pages
- About: [https://deardhruv.com/about/](https://deardhruv.com/about/)
- Posts: [https://deardhruv.com/posts/](https://deardhruv.com/posts/)
- Projects: [https://deardhruv.com/other/](https://deardhruv.com/other/)

## Technical Specifications
- Sitemap: [https://deardhruv.com/sitemap.xml](https://deardhruv.com/sitemap.xml)
- RSS Feed: [https://deardhruv.com/index.xml](https://deardhruv.com/index.xml)
- JSON Feed: [https://deardhruv.com/feed.json](https://deardhruv.com/feed.json)
- MCP Server Card: [https://deardhruv.com/mcp.json](https://deardhruv.com/mcp.json)

## Markdown Content
Most pages on this site support the `Accept: text/markdown` header for clean text delivery.
Individual post markdown files can be found at `[post-url]/index.md`.
